[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11011011 6
1 11101110 6
2 10010110 4
3 00000000 a
4 00001110 3
5 10011010 4
6 01001110 4
7 01000100 2

12 21 00001010 2
23 32 01000100 2 match 7

56 65 11001010 4
67 76 10000110 3
70 07 00000110 2
